message.content:
@startuml
participant "MobileApp" as MobileApp1
participant "MobileApp" as MobileApp2
participant "Apollo" as Apollo
participant "Storage" as Storage
participant "Ironclad" as Ironclad
participant "Onfido" as Onfido

MobileApp1 -->|Any proof of XYZ or document related call that could result in a call to Onfido| Apollo

Apollo -->|GetLocalApplicant(sub)| Storage

alt [when the user was previously provisioned as an onfido applicant]
    Apollo -->|Applicant { Id = sub; ApplicantId = OnfidoApplicantId; }| Storage
    alt [when the user was not previously provisioned]
        Storage -->|null| Apollo
        Apollo -->|GetUserInfo(sub)| Ironclad
        Ironclad -->|Claims[] { ... }| Apollo
        Apollo -->|POST https://api.onfido.com/v2/applicants| Ironclad
        Ironclad -->|200 Applicant { Id = applicantId; [...]}| Apollo
        Apollo -->|Applicant { Id = sub, ApplicantId = onfidoApplicantId}| Storage
    end
end

@enduml
